Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Gene Marchi.

Mr. Kato stated that there was some art work that Mr. Conant was emotionally attached to and some of his personal property in the storage facility, that it was the Trustee's opinion that they could be taken out storage and donated, or they could close it or move it to a smaller unit. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Y. Watts.
